name: Gold Tone Textured Heart Statement Earrings
description: Elevate your evening look with these bold gold-tone statement earrings. Featuring a large heart shape with intricate, crumpled metal texturing and a premium anti-tarnish finish for a striking, vintage-inspired aesthetic.

media.alt_text: Model wearing large gold tone textured heart statement earrings

faqs.question: Are these statement earrings heavy on the earlobes?
faqs.answer: While they provide a bold oversized look, they are crafted to be hollowed or lightweight enough for comfortable evening wear.

faqs.question: Is the jewelry anti-tarnish?
faqs.answer: Yes, these earrings are protected by a high-quality anti-tarnish finish to preserve their textured golden shine.

meta_title: Gold Tone Textured Heart Statement Earrings | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Make a statement with our Gold Tone Textured Heart Earrings. Featuring a vintage-inspired crumpled metal design and a premium anti-tarnish finish.
